zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cokayne於大約1360年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，他的父親John Cockayne36歲，母親Cecelia Vernon31歲。他於1387年與Baroness Ida de Grey在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1400年被列為chief baron of the exchequer。他去世於1429年5月22日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾考卡 哈特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cokayne于大约1360年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩时，他的父亲John Cockayne36岁，母亲Cecelia Vernon31岁。他于1387年与Baroness Ida de Grey在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1400年被列为chief baron of the exchequer。他去世于1429年5月22日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾考卡 哈特利。

nameMeanings.name: Cokayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cockayne
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): nickname for a dreamer, from Middle English cokayne ‘cloud-cuckooland’, the name of an imaginary paradise (Old French (pays de) cocaigne, from Middle Low German kōkenje, a diminutive of kōke ‘cake’, since in this land the houses were thought to be made of cake). It may also be a variant of Cocking or from the unflattering Middle English nickname cokin (Old French coquin) ‘disreputable person’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cokayne was born about 1360, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, his father, John Cockayne, was 36 and his mother, Cecelia Vernon, was 31. He married Baroness Ida de Grey in 1387, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1400, at the age of 41, his occupation is listed as chief baron of the exchequer. He died on 22 May 1429, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cokayne est né environ 1360, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John Cockayne, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Cecelia Vernon, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Ida de Grey en 1387, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1400, à l’âge de 41 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est chief baron of the exchequer. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1429, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cokayne um 1360 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cockayne 36 und seine Mutter Cecelia Vernon 31. Er hat 1387 in Derbyshire, England Baroness Ida de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1400, als er 41 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als chief baron of the exchequer aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Mai 1429 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cokayne è nato il circa 1360 nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, John Cockayne, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Cecelia Vernon, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Ida de Grey nel 1387, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1400, all'età di 41 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come chief baron of the exchequer. Morì il 22 maggio 1429, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cokayneが約1360年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父John Cockayneは36歳，母Cecelia Vernonは31歳であった。1387年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでBaroness Ida de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1400年，41歳の時，職業はchief baron of the exchequerと記録されている。彼は1429年5月22日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアコクアイン ハトリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cokayne(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 더비실르 애쉬보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cockayne(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecelia Vernon(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1387년 영국 더비실르에서 Baroness Ida de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1400년, 41세의 나이로 그의 직업은 chief baron of the exchequer이었다. 그는 1429년 5월 22일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 콕아이인 하틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cokayne nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cockayne, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Cecelia Vernon, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Ida de Grey em 1387, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1400, com 41 anos, sua profissão aparece como chief baron of the exchequer. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1429, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cokayne родился около 1360 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Cockayne было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecelia Vernon, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Ida de Grey в 1387 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1400 году, в возрасте 41 год,  он работал по профессии chief baron of the exchequer. Он умер 22 мая 1429 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности коккеин хатли, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cokayne nació aproximadamente 1360, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Cockayne, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Cecelia Vernon, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Baroness Ida de Grey en 1387, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1400, a la edad de 41 años, su ocupación registrada era chief baron of the exchequer. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1429, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Cockayne Hatley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
